calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
TENTATIVE RULING: Grant without hearing.
Status of filing the Inventory and Appraisal is set for 11/2/26. If the I&A is not filed by 10/23/26, an appearance will be required on 11/2/26.
Status of closing the estate will be set for 10/11/27.
The administrator must file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of a report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. C. Section 12200 (requesting additional time for estate administration) at least two weeks before 10/11/27. Appearance will be required on 10/11/27 if no petition has been filed.

EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE
